name: X760 heavy-lift quad
tuning_goal: stable and predictable heavy-lift flight, not agile racing behavior
notes: Large 17-inch props respond slowly; do not tune for racing-like agility.
If vibration is normal but attitude oscillates near 1 Hz, treat it as possible physical low-frequency sway or wind before aggressive PID changes.
Before changing PID, prioritize battery/current sensing, center of gravity, calibration, loose motor/ESC wiring, and prop balance checks.
